name: Corridors of Their Memories
short_description: Enter another person’s memories and search for clues to identify the culprit. Together with former police officer John Victor, solve the case assigned for his career advancement.
detailed_description:
Corridors of Their Memories is a short visual novel in the thriller and detective genres.

The story takes place in 2022, when the FBI begins using new technology that reads residual neural signals. Scientists have discovered how memory is stored and learned to extract it. Agents can now see everything the victim saw — including the attacker’s face.

John Victor, a former police officer, must solve a case as part of the examination to transfer into Unit V, which specializes in using this technology.

Whether he succeeds depends entirely on your decisions.

Features:

★ A focused story about a single crime
★ A narrative that reacts to your choices
★ Numerous decisions requiring memory interpretation
★ 3 different endings
★ True Ending unlocks after the first playthrough

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Japanese
